title: Business Value Operating Model Blueprint
summary: Defines the structure of a serious AI business value operating model, including profit levers, opportunities, process redesign, governance, KPIs, quick wins, and a scaling roadmap.
claims: The right end state is a business value operating model rather than a loose collection of AI ideas.
A serious AI transformation blueprint needs profit levers, function opportunities, process redesign, governance, KPI logic, quick wins, and a scaling roadmap.
The central question is where value exists, what should change, how it should be governed, and how it should scale.
proof_points: This blueprint is consistent with the profit-lever, process-redesign, and function-opportunity records already added.
It matches the current Joz emphasis on systems, governance, evaluation, and real operating value.
The structure avoids technology-first AI programs with weak commercial accountability.
